results.title: Automated: Automate any workflow by recording a demo | Product Hunt
results.content:
👋 Hello! 👋   
Robert here, founder of Automated.  
  
Automated lets you record any workflow once and run it automatically in the cloud. If you can do it in a browser, Automated can do it on autopilot. No coding required, just record your screen.  
  
The reason most automations are never built is because they take too long to setup. Zapier and n8n both have learning curves, Automated doesn't.  
  
🤖 What makes Automated different?  
  
- Works anywhere. Use it on internal tools, legacy portals, or sites behind logins  
- Create automations using just a recording, no need to use workflow building tools  
- Automated spins up its own browser and uses computer use agents to follow your flow  
- Runs in the cloud in the background, not on your computer  
  
💡 What teams use Automated for: [...] Automated

results.title: Trace Reviews (2026) | Product Hunt
results.content:
#### vs Alternatives

Zapier
Make

I experimented with Zapier and Make, but they usually expect you to get super detailed from the get-go or handle everything with bots. Trace’s auto-delegate and “break into subtasks” just matches how real teams split up work.

Ghulam Abbas

#### What's great

We automate review cycles end-to-end but can always step in and change paths, so control is never lost.

#### What needs improvement

More integrations, particularly with CRM and storage tools.

#### vs Alternatives

n8n
Gumloop

I’ve tried n8n and Gumloop, but Trace lets us pivot between AI and manual work without friction or risk of losing progress, which is essential for compliance-heavy tasks that we do (I am in financial audit).

Michael Vavilov

#### What's great [...] Michael Vavilov

#### What's great

prompt to workflow idea clicks for me. I like that I can see exactly which steps are automated and which ones I should handle myself. Being able to change that after the fact is huge

#### What needs improvement

would like deeper tool connections and faster UI feedback

#### vs Alternatives

i also use zapier for simple webhook automations, but trace is just more transparent about what’s automated and what’s not. easier to pick up and tweak as you go

Ravi Goswami

#### What's great

Timur Zakirov

#### What's great

Mymiss

#### What's great

An excellent workflow tool that can directly turn your simple ideas into a workflow, which is highly similar to your original thoughts.

#### vs Alternatives [...] #### What needs improvement

Clear value once you’re using it, but onboarding could get you there faster with more opinionated starter workflows. Better visibility into what’s automated vs handled by humans can also help as workflows grow in complexity.   
Also, I think, something like ROI view (time saved, steps automated etc) would make internal adoption even easier - considering sometimes you have to "sell" this to your colleagues.

#### vs Alternatives

We haven't compared Trace to other solutions, just to what we could built ourselves. Obviously we decided to outsource this (i.e. use Trace) and focus on our product instead.

Dmytro Tkachenko

#### What's great
